title: Secure Session Management

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: Secure Session Management

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'><rect x='10' y='10' width='380' height='280' rx='10' fillOpacity='.2'/><rect x='20' y='20' width='360' height='260' fill='#B7D7CD'/><text x='20' y='30' fontSize='24' fill='#C06C88'>Session Manager</text><rect x='50' y='100' width='300' height='30' rx='5' fill='#C06C88'/><text x='60' y='115' fontSize='18' fill='#411C56'>Select Interval</text><circle cx='320' cy='115' r='12' fill='#411C56'/><rect x='340' y='115' width='60' height='30' rx='5' fill='#B7D7CD'/><text x='365' y='130' fontSize='18' fill='#C06C88'>Apply</text><rect x='200' y='150' width='200' height='40' rx='5' fill='#C06C88'/><text x='210' y='165' fontSize='18' fill='#411C56'>Search Sessions</text><text x='20' y='250' fontSize='18' fill='#C06C88'>Session Status:</text><circle cx='320' cy='250' r='12' fill='#411C56'/><rect x='340' y='250' width='60' height='30' rx='5' fill='#B7D7CD'/><text x='365' y='265' fontSize='18' fill='#C06C88'>Active</text></svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must use JWT for authentication and validation
Must implement OTP validation for MFA
Must display user sessions with interactive filters for time interval and session status

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: Secure Session Management

gradingCriteria.description: Verify JWT-based authentication and validation for user sessions
Confirm MFA OTP validation for session management
Evaluate interactive filtering and display of user sessions
